title: Guess the Majority in a Hidden Array
titleCn: 找出隐藏数组中出现次数最多的元素

detail.title: Guess the Majority in a Hidden Array
hints: If you find that 2 indexes in the array (id1, id2) have the same value (nums [id1] == nums [id2]), you could infer the values of (x, y) based on the results of query (id1, id2, x, y).
